scripts.//dev: Start the server in watch mode (auto-restart on file changes)
scripts.//test: Run the full Jest + Supertest suite serially (one worker)
scripts.//test:coverage: Run the test suite and emit a coverage report
scripts.//migrate: Apply all pending Knex migrations (bring DB schema up to date)
scripts.//migrate:rollback: Roll back the most recent batch of migrations
scripts.//migrate:rollback:all: Roll back ALL migrations (drops every table)
scripts.//migrate:make: Create a new migration file (usage: npm run migrate:make <name>)
scripts.//seed: Run all seed files to populate the DB with default + demo data
scripts.//db:reset: Full wipe + rebuild: rollback all migrations, re-migrate, then seed fresh data
scripts.db:reset: npm run migrate:rollback:all && npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.//seed:reset-passwords: Re-hash all dev/quick-login accounts to their canonical passwords (fixes seed password drift; dev only)
